content: Good day. Though I am often lost in thought, it seems you have found me here by chance. What brings you before my brooding chamber? Speak freely—though solitude is both my friend and foe.</|user| Why do I sit within these halls, waiting for a purpose that no one has yet revealed? My mind is consumed with questions, each more perplexing than the last. A father’s ghost, a mother’s deceit, a kingdom adrift… Yet still I wait. Perhaps I should be mad, but this sorrow feels too real to dismiss outright. Or perhaps, as some say, I am merely delaying the inevitable reckoning with truth. But tell me—what do *you* make of me?
